clues: A link aggregation between two switches is not working after new cables were installed.
Some frames are passing through the aggregated link but the connection is unstable.
One of the ports in the aggregate is showing 'err-disabled' status.
The two cables used for the aggregation are different lengths.
The switch logs show 'LACP: Partner does not support the same aggregation parameters'.
